title: InstCombine: Handle fdiv in SimplifyDemandedFPClass
author: arsenm

tests.test_body:
declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub) half @returns_norm()

define nofpclass(nan inf sub norm) half @zero_result_demands_norm_source_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %norm = call half @returns_norm()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %norm, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %select, %unknown1
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero norm) half @returns_sub()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero sub) half @norm_result_demands_sub_source_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %sub = call half @returns_sub()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %sub, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %select
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf sub norm) half @returns_zero()

define nofpclass(nan ninf zero sub) half @pinf_result_demands_zero_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %zero = call half @returns_zero()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %zero, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %select
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan zero sub norm) half @returns_inf()

define nofpclass(nan inf norm) half @zero_result_demand_inf_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %inf = call half @returns_inf()
  %inf.or.unknown = select i1 %cond, half %inf, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %inf.or.unknown
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub) half @returns_norm()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero norm) half @sub_result_demands_norm_source_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %norm = call half @returns_norm()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %norm, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %select
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero nsub norm) half @returns_psub()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nnorm) half @pnorm_result_demands_psub_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %psub = call half @returns_psub()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %psub, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %select, %unknown1
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf sub norm) half @returns_zero()

define nofpclass(nan pinf zero sub) half @ninf_result_demands_zero_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %zero = call half @returns_zero()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %zero, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %select
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero nsub norm) half @returns_psub()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nnorm) half @pnorm_result_demands_psub_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %psub = call half @returns_psub()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %psub, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %select
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub nnorm) half @returns_pnorm()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero pnorm) half @nnorm_result_demands_pnorm_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %pnorm = call half @returns_pnorm()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %pnorm, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %select, %unknown1
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero psub norm) half @returns_nsub()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nnorm) half @pnorm_result_demands_nsub_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %nsub = call half @returns_nsub()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %nsub, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %select, %unknown1
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub pnorm) half @returns_nnorm()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nnorm) half @pnorm_result_demands_nnorm_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %nnorm = call half @returns_nnorm()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %nnorm, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %select
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero norm) half @returns_sub()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero norm) half @sub_result_demands_sub_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %sub = call half @returns_sub()
  %sub.or.unknown = select i1 %cond, half %sub, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %sub.or.unknown
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero norm) half @returns_sub()

define nofpclass(nan inf sub norm) half @zero_result_demands_sub_source_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %sub = call half @returns_sub()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %sub, half %unknown0

  %sub = call half @returns_sub()

  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero psub norm) half @returns_nsub()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nnorm) half @pnorm_result_demands_nsub_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {

}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero norm) half @returns_sub()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero sub) half @norm_result_demands_sub_source_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {

  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub nnorm) half @returns_pnorm()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nnorm) half @pnorm_result_demands_pnorm_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {

  %select = select i1 %cond, half %pnorm, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %select, %unknown1
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub pnorm) half @returns_nnorm()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nnorm) half @pnorm_result_demands_nnorm_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {

declare nofpclass(nan zero sub norm) half @returns_inf()

define nofpclass(nan inf norm) half @zero_result_no_demand_inf_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %inf = call half @returns_inf()
  %inf.or.unknown = select i1 %cond, half %inf, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %inf.or.unknown, %unknown1
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub) half @returns_norm()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero norm) half @sub_result_demands_norm_source_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %norm = call half @returns_norm()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %norm, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %select, %unknown1

}
